⚠️ Usage Guidelines

  • 🔒 Use unique strong passwords per batch
  • 🌐 Bind proxies for geo-targeted accounts
  • 📱 Use emulators for mobile app accounts
  • 🛡️ Anti-detect profiles reduce bans
  • 📊 Monitor account health in Streaming Accounts
  • 🔄 Rotate passwords regularly for security
